sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 40

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 40:1
items.html: (to the question) See Answer 143. And know that these Gevurot come to her from the Yesod that rose and became Tiferet; hence they are discernments of HGT [Hesed, Gevura, Tiferet], for the middle line comprises the ends. Therefore the Fathers stamped the Yesod of the Nukva: these HGT, which passed over her Hey Tachtona [lower Hey] from above downward, became for her the discernment of an inverted seal — for the Gevurot, being males, are all protrusions, and they made in her a sunken seal; that is, according to the measure of their protrusion, a measure of sinking was made in her. And this is the secret of "the well the princes dug" — who are the Fathers. (p. 790, Item 87)
